{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":381},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7585995010779087678","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的综漫日常文，节奏把控得很好，目前看下来非常舒服，不过这边问个问题，这应该不是后宫文吧，我之前搜综漫日常的时候一眼下去全是后宫。如果这是后宫我就走了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766258588,"group_id":"7575165854497639486","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7UIZf59Tmof+i9Y48qdHrVHPUtlMQ+vntUR9ulxTHkY","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4cb3b18e6cb54ff2b11acfb381c4f3d5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707305&x-signature=qjEKbjvwSLDzFEH8P%2Bhpj6tvCLw%3D","user_id":"4119229321978336","user_name":"德莉傻世界第一聪明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4119229321978336","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575165854497639486","book_info":{"abstract":"（目前融合的世界有夏洛特、龙女仆、零之使魔、玉子市场、声之形，夏目友人帐、入间同学入魔了，后续会根据读者老爷的要求加新世界进去。）
“饼藏哆啦，快用你无敌的大脑想想办法啊！”
“我真的只会一点点啊！”大路饼藏欲哭无泪。
……
我叫大路饼藏，我的梦想是作为一名真正的普通人，享受平静的校园与日常生活。
但为什么我身边总是这些奇奇怪怪的人啊！
“说到底，还不是因为你解开了圣剑的封印吗？！”
“谁知道里面是一条龙啊！”
“……那不是完蛋了吗！”
“快召唤露科亚来救我们呀！！”
露易兹干脆大喊道。
“可恶，我已经召唤过了，但是露科亚好像被我传送到魔界了！”
“你这个不靠谱的笨蛋！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ff94af02f63e38b00c68859a6be4bf9a","author":"爱死比尔","author_id":"","book_id":"7575165854497639486","book_name":"综漫：努力让不平凡生活变得幸福","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8f0e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7575389971922567704","read_count":"15275","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"510678"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"231","tags":"动漫衍生,重生,多女主,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/81df008faa5394b0afdefe1f7082bc40~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365968&x-signature=kDCyosYkL97R4VxAmd9GAWFuCUA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4218148318357607","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"145"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":25599,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":27798,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":10567},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1766320017,"author_reply_time":1766320386,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7596316030806983486","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体评分：⭐⭐⭐⭐ 半

评价：伟大，无需多言

适合看惯了无脑爽，并且想看享受平静生活的，俗话说的好，平平淡淡才是真，古人诚不欺我也

综漫文，但是却把群像写的不错，每位原著人物的出现都没有ooc，光是这一点就值7分了，爽点，泪点，却也不少，并且都恰到时机的出现了

当然，最核心的还是在于一个氛围，一种感觉，看了这本小说，就如同夏日里的一缕清风，在这个躁动不安的时代给你带来一种平淡生活的美好体验"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768657534,"group_id":"7575165854497639486","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N25tOtinEaQ/oRqGRaRD/lY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bdb0e18c3ec54a038abb5410a642af7c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707535&x-signature=N4twZahBJiR6CQ899XXnxa%2BoaT8%3D","user_id":"329501318854488","user_name":"超级闲鱼佬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"329501318854488","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575165854497639486","book_info":{"abstract":"（目前融合的世界有夏洛特、龙女仆、零之使魔、玉子市场、声之形，夏目友人帐、入间同学入魔了，后续会根据读者老爷的要求加新世界进去。）

……

hor":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7580578717701948222","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"至23章。
这种感觉只在猫《在综漫的日常生活》，以及文豪那本书里见过。
带着淡淡的温馨气息和小溪流淌的味道，作者是下了功夫的，字里行间都能感觉到。
如果期待的话，请点进来看一看吧，不会让你失望的，这是一部日常的佳作。
愿你我都能过上梦寐以求的平凡幸福的生活。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764993429,"group_id":"7575165854497639486","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱赞美世界，秋赞美春天，那边有棵小树在赞美落叶，我赞美一切","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4RYTDNOgu/D858wn0qQqnvsfkTJNrJ2AbaEQoGmbrKH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/68f04ae74976438cb24e5a97a8d6dda4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704940&x-signature=84IYF2Y3MbquFlEHej7YUX0BvzE%3D","user_id":"2375398104238579","user_name":"永恒遥远的蓝色天际线"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2375398104238579","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575165854497639486","book_info":{"abstract":"（目前融合的世界有夏洛特、龙女仆、零之使魔、玉子市场、声之形，夏目友人帐、入间同学入魔了，后续会根据读者老爷的要求加新世界进去。）

"author":0,"author_digg_time":1765132011,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7589554936066245438","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看的一本综漫呐，没有多少毒点，或许前期还有一些牵强的剧情推动方式，比如主角刚学会造魔法道具，就让玉子平地摔把主角口袋扯开暴露出来，不过也就用这一回，到了后面就是让主角自己多管闲事了，反正很闲啊主角
主角的设定是初见一个事物就能懂六成知识，也只限于合格的程度，但是自从捡到异世界的龙财宝解锁了龙语和魔法科技树后，感觉就是地球知识天花板了，什么都会，什么都造的出来，
唯一可以吐槽的点是作者的选材略显小众，哪怕我自认为算个小二次元，但是这本小说的出场人物，我也就认识一半，还都是因为主角后面认识的小伙伴，都是比较新的动画人物，商店街的一堆人我一个都不认识，希望作者能标一下人物的出处吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767084414,"group_id":"7575165854497639486","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3/WUneFVv12wsWFHUYI3moDR1LFftkAdkpwmw1k0lax","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/132c12e8ec3944d0a6beb3a7f0a79042~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704014&x-signature=95WCw%2FyokSs%2FZio0DpBKyHjBo4E%3D","user_id":"2612857205177480","user_name":"酒七零"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2612857205177480","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774687192,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":24,"name":"气氛达人","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/b7c8672db629fbb3d8f83a83721675dc~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/d2c24adfe48394cad03d7b1d29d70622~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575165854497639486","book_info":{"abstract":"（目前融合的世界有夏洛特、龙女仆、零之使魔、玉子市场、声之形，夏目友人帐、入间同学入魔了，后续会根据读者老爷的要求加新世界进去。）

author":0,"author_digg_time":1767106014,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7587038523569799960","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"斯巴拉西！斯巴拉西！绝佳的节奏控制，简直就是节奏大师啊！即使是大杂烩，但丝毫没有混乱的感觉。感觉作者是那种沾花惹草也不会被柴刀的人啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766549167,"group_id":"7575165854497639486","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"叠，我求求你们了，不要写ai文了。即使要写，也要调教下啊！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N++k4piK2ynvkNNK+d3sGz/PL+KthLZJ0isWe5eVVCd0","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/337b19a0b86c46d0a0a3ad7e4b0a1728~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706035&x-signature=5Oc9UMYN28lk6EKm6rSCzrbPJyE%3D","user_id":"1887216566811407","user_name":"芙卡洛斯我没有说谎"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1887216566811407","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575165854497639486","book_info":{"abstract":"（目前融合的世界有夏洛特、龙女仆、零之使魔、玉子市场、声之形，夏目友人帐、入间同学入魔了，后续会根据读者老爷的要求加新世界进去。）
“饼藏哆啦，快用你无敌的大脑想想办法啊！”
“我真的只会一点点啊！”大路饼藏欲哭无泪。
……
我叫大路饼藏，我的梦想是作为一名真正的普通人，享受平静的校园与日常生活。
但为什么我身边总是这些奇奇怪怪的人啊！
“说到底，还不是因为你解开了圣剑的封印吗？！”
“谁知道里面是一条龙啊！”
“……那不是完蛋了吗！”
“快召唤露科亚来救我们呀！！”
露易兹干脆大喊道。
“可恶，我已经召唤过了，但是露科亚好像被我传送到魔界了！”

“……那不是完蛋了吗！”
“快召唤露科亚来救我们呀！！”
露易兹干脆大喊道。
“可恶，我已经召唤过了，但是露科亚好像被我传送到魔界了！”

hor":0,"author_digg_time":1765972564,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7590066525581902617","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"毫无疑问的好书，节奏的把控好，文笔也够好，角色虽然出现的多但主次分明，不会有了新角色就忘了老角色，在番茄上很少能看到这么温暖的书了，不知道为什么近些年很多日常文转向疯和颠以及乐子文了，虽然刚看几本确实挺新鲜，但看多了就疲惫和厌倦了，如今能看到这种能将温暖贯穿全文的书实属我作为读者的幸福。新的一年了，祝作者身体健康，万事如意，也希望作者能把这篇故事写完。[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767205330,"group_id":"7575165854497639486","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz4hVodSwyfcvJVotte8Nt0xj0ORpk5N9nEXb4Uc13+k","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2568932713834491","user_name":"怀江的许河"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2568932713834491","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575165854497639486","book_info":{"abstract":"（目前融合的世界有夏洛特、龙女仆、零之使魔、玉子市场、声之形，夏目友人帐、入间同学入魔了，后续会根据读者老爷的要求加新世界进去。）

露易兹干脆大喊道。
“可恶，我已经召唤过了，但是露科亚好像被我传送到魔界了！”
